sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, nowInBlock()), (2, nowInBlock());
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = nowInBlock() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, nowInBlock() AS current_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_time, nowInBlock('UTC') AS current_utc_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < nowInBlock();
